reason: A descent into madness in a haunted hotel that leaves an unforgettable chill.
A cosmic horror thriller that crafts an oppressive, claustrophobic atmosphere.
A time-travel mystery that builds relentless tension and lingering unease.
A dystopian dark future where replicants blur the line between man and machine.
A coastal town besieged by an impenetrable, vengeful fog generates creeping dread.
A shocking act of violence in a secluded motel that forever changes its guest.
A killer stalks teenagers in their dreams, twisting sleep into a horrifying trap.
A ghostly comedy-thriller that fuses humor with unsettling supernatural chills.
Children with eerie powers create a chilling sense of uncanny otherness.
A stylized, brutal vision of a dystopian future that lingers in the mind.
